mapper.select: SELECT id, student_id, semester, tested_count, score_summary, semester_level, last_tested_at, created_at, updated_at FROM student_assessment_semester_summary WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND semester = #{semester} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, student_id, semester, tested_count, score_summary, semester_level, last_tested_at, created_at, updated_at FROM student_assessment_semester_summary WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY last_tested_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT COUNT(s.student_id) FROM student_assessment_semester_summary ss JOIN student s ON ss.student_id = s.student_id WHERE ss.semester = #{semester} AND ss.semester_level = '危险' AND s.class_name IN
#{className}

SELECT ccm.class_name AS className, COUNT(DISTINCT sass.student_id) AS dangerCount FROM counselor_class_mapping ccm LEFT JOIN student s ON s.class_name = ccm.class_name LEFT JOIN student_assessment_semester_summary sass ON sass.student_id = s.student_id AND sass.semester = #{semester} AND sass.semester_level = '危险' WHERE ccm.counselor_account = #{counselorAccount} GROUP BY ccm.class_name ORDER BY ccm.class_name

SELECT sem.semester AS semester, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ccm.counselor_account IS NOT NULL THEN sass.student_id END) AS dangerCount FROM ( SELECT '第1学期' AS semester UNION ALL SELECT '第2学期' UNION ALL SELECT '第3学期' UNION ALL SELECT '第4学期' UNION ALL SELECT '第5学期' UNION ALL SELECT '第6学期' UNION ALL SELECT '第7学期' UNION ALL SELECT '第8学期' ) sem LEFT JOIN student_assessment_semester_summary sass ON sass.semester = sem.semester AND sass.semester_level = '危险' LEFT JOIN student s ON s.student_id = sass.student_id LEFT JOIN counselor_class_mapping ccm ON ccm.class_name = s.class_name AND ccm.counselor_account = #{counselorAccount} GROUP BY sem.semester ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(sem.semester, '第', ''), '学期', '') AS UNSIGNED)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_assessment_semester_summary ( student_id, semester, tested_count, score_summary, semester_level, last_tested_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{semester}, #{testedCount}, #{scoreSummary}, #{semesterLevel}, #{lastTestedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE student_assessment_semester_summary SET student_id = #{studentId}, semester = #{semester}, tested_count = #{testedCount}, score_summary = #{scoreSummary}, semester_level = #{semesterLevel}, last_tested_at = #{lastTestedAt}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
